description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed house with a boxy, geometric design and a predominantly white exterior. The structure features multiple rectangular volumes, some with large windows and others with minimal fenestration, creating a dynamic facade. The roof includes a central blue-tinted skylight or pool, and there are several rooftop terraces, some with wooden decking. Palm trees and landscaping surround the house, enhancing its contemporary, tropical aesthetic. The front includes a garage door and a main entryway with a small overhang, while the rear opens to a larger patio area. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with outdoor elements.
description: A modern, boxy white house with flat roofs, large windows, rooftop terraces, and surrounding palm trees. Features include a central skylight or pool and a prominent garage entry.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, garage door, and several palm trees in front of the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, rooftop terraces, and the central blue skylight or pool.
description_view_2: Rear view with a focus on the back patio area, dense palm tree landscaping, and large windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more rooftop features, additional palm trees, and the clean, geometric lines of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, minimal steps, and a large garage door; clean and understated modern design.
